object.name: Tropical Entry Planter
object.description: Dark ceramic or concrete planter pot, medium size, containing lush tropical ornamental plant. Modern style to match the casita aesthetic. Placed flanking entry steps.

evidence.notes: Planter pots visible at the base of the entry deck steps on both sides.

object.image_edit_prompt: A single modern dark concrete planter pot with a lush tropical ornamental plant, isolated on pure white background, photorealistic, PBR ready, no shadows, centered composition, full object visible
